title: AUDIENCE-ASK — Eva picks up the glowing bottle
prompt: Tight shot on @beach-shore — wet sand at the tide line, gentle ripples lapping. @Eva already kneeling in the wet sand on hands and knees, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow falling forward, both hands cupping a small glowing aqua-blue glass bottle she's pulled out of the wet sand. The @magic-bottle has a tiny cork stopper and emits a faint magical sparkle, the rolled paper note visible inside through the glass. Eva looks at it in awe, mouth a small 'O' of wonder, then turns her face directly toward the camera. Eva (looking right at the camera, breathless whisper): "Did YOU see what I just FOUND?!" She lifts the bottle higher, eyes huge, holding it out like a trophy.
